data.acceptance: 1. Calling `doResetWatchdog` on a live session emits a `console.log` line that contains `[terminal-manager] [watchdog]`, `armed`, and `timeoutMs=<N>` (where N is the configured timeout). 2. Triggering the dispose path (`runtime.dispose()`) while a watchdog timer is active emits a `console.log` line that contains `[terminal-manager] [watchdog]` and `cancelled`. 3. No log is emitted by dispose when `watchdogTimer` is already null (i.e. watchdog was never set or already fired). 4. The existing e2e test in `src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-watchdog-e2e.test.ts` continues to pass unchanged. 5. New unit assertions in that same file (or a companion spec) spy on `console.log` and assert lines 1 and 2 above are emitted with the correct tags and fields. Run `bun run test` to confirm all watchdog tests are green.
